SKELETON.name: Skeleton
SKELETON.description: A skeleton armed with a sword leaps from the shadows to attack you!

ZOMBIE.name: Zombie
ZOMBIE.description: A drooling zombie climbs out of a nearby coffin!

CULTIST.name: Cultist
CULTIST.description: A cloaked figure rises to greet you!

RAIDER.name: Raider
RAIDER.description: A ragtag soldier brandishing a blade jumps out from behind a nearby column!

SPECTRALGUARD.name: Spectral Guard
SPECTRALGUARD.description: A dark guard blocks your path!

GARGOYL.name: Gargoyl
GARGOYL.description: A menacing Gargoyl swoops from the ceiling to attack you!

HELLHOUND.name: HellHound
HELLHOUND.description: A bloodthirsty mongrel comes bounding across the room at you!

WRAITH.name: Wraith
WRAITH.description: A dark shape spreads across the room. A shadowy figure stands before you!

POLTERGEIST.name: Poltergeist
POLTERGEIST.description: Objects begin flying across the room. A translucent figure whirls past you!

CYCLOPS.name: Cyclops
CYCLOPS.description: The earth rumbles as a one eyed giant stumbles through the opposite doorway!

LUMBERINGHORROR.name: Lumbering Horror
LUMBERINGHORROR.description: A massive mound of flesh and flailing tentacles gushes out from the chasm!

DRAKE.name: Drake
DRAKE.description: A mighty drake rises from a mountain of treasure!
